message:
fix: UTF-8 safe truncation in resources.rs + defensive partial message handling

- resources.rs: Replace String::truncate(60) with chars().take(57) to prevent
  panics on multi-byte UTF-8 characters in template descriptions
- agent.rs: Add defensive fallback in update_partial_message when added_partial
  is true but last message isn't Assistant (matches finalize_assistant_message
  pattern) to prevent silent data loss during streaming

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
